UOTR_INSTRUCTIONS.INSTRUCTIONS_1: Before filling up the One Time Onboarding Application, the candidate must go through the detailed notification and instructions available on the UPSC Portal. Please proceed to fill the online application only if you are satisfied that you possess the minimum essential qualifications stipulated for the post in the detailed notification.
UOTR_INSTRUCTIONS.INSTRUCTIONS_2: The candidate is advised to fill in all his/her particulars in the One Time Onboarding Application carefully as submission of incorrect information may computer-based shortlistig apart from departmental rejection.
UOTR_INSTRUCTIONS.INSTRUCTIONS_3: The candidate is advised to fill his/her correct and active email address & mobile number in the online application as any Correspondence will be made by the UPSC through e-mail & mobile only. The candidate is also advised to refer to UPSC website of the commission for regular updates.
UOTR_INSTRUCTIONS.INSTRUCTIONS_4: The candidate is advised to submit only single Online Registration Application.
UOTR_INSTRUCTIONS.INSTRUCTIONS_5: Registration Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstance nor can the fee be held in reserve for any other examination or selection.
UOTR_INSTRUCTIONS.INSTRUCTIONS_6: The candidate is not required to send the printouts of his/her online applications.
UOTR_INSTRUCTIONS.INSTRUCTIONS_7: The candidate must upload only relevant documents wherever required in the online application. The uploading of irrelevant/ illegible/ fabricated or Password-protected documents may lead to rejection of his/her application apart from other appropriate action at the discretion of the Commission.
UOTR_INSTRUCTIONS.DECLERATION: I hereby declare that I have read and understood the above instructions carefully and I accept all the terms and conditions mentioned hereinabove.

STEP_1.OPTION_1: Candidate is advised to furnish their Aadhaar as their Identity proof and use Aadhaare-KYC process to verify their Identity and portal account.
STEP_1.OPTION_2: AadhaareKYC:  After entering the Aadhaar number, the candidate can undertake eKYC verification by getting a OTP on their registered mobile number and claim ownership of the Aadhaar number.
STEP_1.OPTION_3: Demographic Authentication may also be undertaken to confirm Name, Gender of the candidate as per Aadhaar is the same as that of the 10<sup>th</sup> board certificate.
STEP_1.OPTION_8: Class 11th / 12<sup>th</sup> ID card issued by School (only for NDA)
STEP_1.OPTION_9: Any of the following ID proof can be provided by the Candidate as  an alternate ID proof

STEP_5.OPTION_1: Candidate must have a valid and permanent caste certificate issued on his/her name by the designated authority.
STEP_5.OPTION_2: A caste certificate should be issued in the name of the candidate. Category certificates issued on the name of parents, siblings shall not be accepted.
STEP_5.OPTION_3: Category certificates issued by Public Representatives, Local bodies, schools and other non-authorized authorities shall not be accepted.
STEP_5.OPTION_4: Category certificate shall be used for verification.
STEP_5.OPTION_5: The candidate must enter carefully the caste and category details as per the permanent caste certificate issued by the respective State authority to the candidate.
STEP_5.OPTION_6: Any request for changing candidate community category during the examination process shall NOT be accepted.  This practice could set a negative precedent, encouraging other candidates to make similar changes without valid reasons. UPSCmay take a strict view against candidates who deliberately attempt to change their community category after submitting their application. [Decision has to be taken]
STEP_5.OPTION_9: SC- I have a permanent SC caste certificate issued by competent authority on my name
STEP_5.OPTION_10: ST- I have a permanent caste certificate issued by competent authority on my name
STEP_5.OPTION_11: OBC- I have a permanent caste certificate issued by competent authority on my name
STEP_5.OPTION_12: EWS- I have a valid EWS certificate issued by the competent authority on my name

FORM.UPDATE_AADHAR: Update Aadhaar Details / ID Card Details
FORM.AADHAR_CARD_ISSED: Has Aadhaar Card been issued to you?
FORM.DEC:
I, the holder of the Aadhaar number mentioned below, hereby provide my consent to the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), New Delhi, to utilize my Aadhaar number, name, date of birth, and mobile number for authentication with the Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI). I have been informed by the UPSC that my identity information will be used exclusively for the examination and recruitment processes administered by the Commission. I have also been informed that my eKYC information may be used for the purpose of preventing malpractices in Examination.

मैं, नीचे दिए गए आधार संख्या का धारक, अपनी सहमति प्रदान करता हूं कि संघ लोक सेवा आयोग (यूपीएससी), नई दिल्ली, मेरे आधार संख्या, नाम, जन्म तिथि और मोबाइल नंबर का उपयोग भारतीय विशिष्ट पहचान प्राधिकरण (यूआईडीएआई) के साथ प्रमाणीकरण के लिए कर सकता है। यूपीएससी द्वारा मुझे सूचित किया गया है कि मेरी पहचान संबंधी जानकारी का उपयोग केवल आयोग द्वारा प्रशासित परीक्षा एवं भर्ती प्रक्रियाओं के लिए किया जाएगा। मुझे यह भी सूचित किया गया है कि मेरी ईकेवाईसी जानकारी का उपयोग परीक्षा में कदाचार को रोकने के उद्देश्य से किया जा सकता है।
FORM.DEC_VID:
I, the holder of the Virtual ID number mentioned below, hereby provide my consent to the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), New Delhi, to utilize my Virtual ID number, name, date of birth, and mobile number for authentication with the Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI). I have been informed by the UPSC that my identity information will be used exclusively for the examination and recruitment processes administered by the Commission. I have also been informed that my eKYC information may be used for the purpose of preventing malpractices in Examinations.

मैं, नीचे दिए गए वर्चुअल आईडी संख्या का धारक, अपनी सहमति प्रदान करता हूं कि संघ लोक सेवा आयोग (यूपीएससी), नई दिल्ली, मेरे वर्चुअल आईडी संख्या, नाम, जन्म तिथि और मोबाइल नंबर का उपयोग भारतीय विशिष्ट पहचान प्राधिकरण (यूआईडीएआई) के साथ प्रमाणीकरण के लिए कर सकता है। यूपीएससी द्वारा मुझे सूचित किया गया है कि मेरी पहचान संबंधी जानकारी का उपयोग केवल आयोग द्वारा प्रशासित परीक्षा एवं भर्ती प्रक्रियाओं के लिए किया जाएगा। मुझे यह भी सूचित किया गया है कि मेरी ईकेवाईसी जानकारी का उपयोग परीक्षाओं में कदाचार को रोकने के उद्देश्य से किया जा सकता है।

NRA_INSTRUCTION.INTRODUCTION_CONTENT: shall act as one stop shop for job aspirants. At present, candidates seeking government jobs have to appear for separate examinations conducted by multiple recruiting agencies for various posts. NGRP aims to unify the examination process and facilitate ease of recruitment.
NRA_INSTRUCTION.INTRODUCTION_CONTENT_1: At present, candidates seeking government jobs have to appear for separate examinations conducted by multiple recruiting agencies for various posts.NGRP aims to unify the examination process and facilitate ease of recruitment.
NRA_INSTRUCTION.CIVIL_SERVANTS: Civil Servants for the East India Company used to be nominated by the Directors of the Company and thereafter trained at Haileybury College in London and then sent to India. Following Lord Macaulay’s Report of the Select Committee of British Parliament, the concept of a merit based modern Civil Service in India was introduced in 1854. The Report recommended that patronage based system of East India Company should be replaced by a permanent Civil Service based on a merit based system with entry through competitive examinations. For this purpose, a Civil Service Commission was setup in 1854 in London and competitive examinations were started in 1855.

OPTIONS.LIST_1: One Time Registration using unique Email ID and Mobile Number.
OPTIONS.LIST_2: No repeated account creation on different portal of Public Examination Authorities (PEAs).
OPTIONS.LIST_3: One Time profile creation of candidates with their Identity details as per 10<sup>th</sup> Class Certificate, Profile Details, Disability Details, Ex-servicemen Details, Educational Qualification details, Photo ID Card Details, Address and Documents.
OPTIONS.LIST_4: View recruitment notices and exam calendar from a single and authentic portal and mobile app instead of visiting multiple portals and websites.
OPTIONS.LIST_5: Link to apply for any exams published by PEAs.

OPTION.LIST_4: Get data of candidates from single source in authentic and seamless manner using APIs.
OPTION.LIST_5: View and publish list of blacklisted candidates.

FAQ.LIST_1: What are the dates of registration/payment of fees for online Registration?

LIST_OPTION_1.OPTION: The announcement /notification mentions in detail about the schedule of registration /payment of fees. The aspirants are requested to kindly refer to the relevant clause mentioned in the advertisement.

LIST_OPTION_2.QUES_1: Q. How much is the registration fee?
LIST_OPTION_2.ANS_1: A. One time non refundable Registration fee is Rs.100/- at any Level and should be paid online method.
LIST_OPTION_2.QUES_2: Q. If I missed the last date of registration, can I go for the same by paying some late fee or penalty?
LIST_OPTION_2.ANS_2: A. There is no such provision as yet.
LIST_OPTION_2.QUES_3: Q. What are the different methods of making payment for Registration?
LIST_OPTION_2.ANS_3:
A. There are two methods available:
   (i) Online : Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card.
   (ii) NEFT/RTGS.
LIST_OPTION_2.QUES_4: Q. How do I pay the registration fees on-line? Can I use internet banking?
LIST_OPTION_2.ANS_4: A. Payment of registration fees through internet banking is permitted. You can also make payment of registration fees by using Net Banking / UPI / Debit Card/ Credit Card.
LIST_OPTION_2.QUES_5: Q. Is a candidate required to seek Registration for every Examination?
LIST_OPTION_2.ANS_5: A. No, Registration for each Examination is not required.

FAQ.LIST_3: > How to Correct 10<sup>th</sup> Class Examination Board Identity Data?

LIST_OPTION_3.TEXT: By mistake I have submitted incorrect indentity information (Date of Birth, Category, Name, Gender, Father's Name, Mother's Name, 10th Class Board Name, 10th Class Board Passing Year.
LIST_OPTION_3.SUB_TEXT: Please make these changes at your end before submitting the Identity details. No change in the data already registered by the candidate in the online registration form is possible as per the terms and conditions of the advertisement /notification. The candidates should check all the entries made by them and only then submit (Register Identity Button) the application.

LIST_OPTION_5.OPTION:
1. Email/SMS not received for Admit Card.
Email/SMS is triggered and the same is sent to the candidates on the Email ID and Mobile No. registered by them in the NGRP Portal.
LIST_OPTION_5.OPTION_1:
2. Cannot download the Examination call letter.
This may be due to unsuccessful registration/ unsuccessful payment/ incorrect login credential/s. Kindly check your credential with your registration.
LIST_OPTION_5.OPTION_2:
3. Request for change in Centre/Venue / Date /Time.
The allotted date, time and venue for the exam cannot be changed as per the terms and conditions of the advertisement.
LIST_OPTION_5.OPTION_3:
4. Allotted Examination center not as per selected exam center.
Candidates who opted for a particular centre of exam might not be accommodated therein for reason beyond the control of NGRP. Such candidates will be allotted other centres. Candidates have to appear for the examination at the allotted Centre only. This is clearly mentioned in the advertisement.
LIST_OPTION_5.OPTION_4:
5. If candidate has other college/exam on same date of NGRP exam:
The candidates may note that Change of Date/session/Venue/Center is not permitted for NGRP examinations.

LIST_OPTION_6.OPTION:
1. Unable to find exact location of exam centre.
The candidate is advised well in advance about the venue of the online examination. There is sufficient time available for the candidate to locate the venue of examination.
LIST_OPTION_6.OPTION_1:
2. Not allowed to appear for exam (Late entry, ID proof, Name mismatch).
The advertisement /notification /call letter mentions in detail about the procedures/conditions to be followed for online examination .The candidate is expected to follow these guidelines to ensure uniformity.
LIST_OPTION_6.OPTION_2:
3. Late attendance for online examinations and complaints about not permitting to attend /participate in online examination.
The reporting time for online examination is printed on the call letter. All candidates have been advised to report to the online examination venue well before the reporting time to avoid denial of entry for the online examination. In any case the candidates will not be permitted to enter the venue of the examination after the prescribed time.
LIST_OPTION_6.OPTION_3:
4. Non-collection of call letters, signature missing in the attendance sheet:
The candidates will be allowed to enter the lab on submission/ authentication of Call letter, ID proof bearing exactly the same name and after checking the Photo ID and other identity related credentials. Secondly signatures of all the candidates present in the lab are to be obtained on the attendance list. The candidates shall note that if they do not/ forget to sign the attendance sheet, their presence will not be considered only on the basis of online exam responses.
LIST_OPTION_6.OPTION_4: 5. Answering a Question: Frequent representations are received about the marking /saving an option /answer/response in online examination.
LIST_OPTION_6.OPTION_5:
In this connection the procedure for answering a multiple choice type question and saving the responses are given below:
To select your answer, click on the button of one of the options
LIST_OPTION_6.OPTION_6:
a. To deselect your chosen answer, click on the button of the chosen option again or click on the Clear Response button
      b. To change your chosen answer, click on the button of another option
      c. To save your answer, you MUST click on the Save & Next button
LIST_OPTION_6.OPTION_7: To mark the question for review, click on the Mark for Review & Next button. If an answer is selected for a question that is Marked for Review, that answer will be considered in the evaluation.
LIST_OPTION_6.OPTION_8:
6. System and server problem in examination/ Due to system problem loss of time in examination/ Re- examination.
Candidates may register complaints on Candidates Grievance Lodging and Redressal Mechanism. Such complaints are addressed on merit.

LIST_OPTION_7.OPTION:
1. What are the cut off marks?
The candidate is requested to kindly refer to the relevant notification available on official NGRP Portal.
LIST_OPTION_7.OPTION_1:
2. How to calculate cut off score/Normalization method/ Equi-percentile method.
The candidate is requested to refer to the relevant clause of the advertisement available on official NGRP Portal for the same.
LIST_OPTION_7.OPTION_2: 3. Provide answer sheet copy/ Question paper /Right Answer key (model Answer key).

LIST_OPTION_8.OPTION:
1. Information about NGRP.
The candidate is requested to kindly visit the official NGRP Portal for the same.
LIST_OPTION_8.OPTION_1:
2. When is the next examination?
Kindly keep visiting the official NGRP Portal from time to time for updates.
LIST_OPTION_8.OPTION_2:
3. How to file RTI in NGRP?
Kindly visit the official NGRP Website.
LIST_OPTION_8.OPTION_3:
4. Provide syllabus/Book names/Coaching/Previous Year Question papers for NGRP exam preparation
NGRP does not provide such details.

CET_APPLY.INSTRUCTIONS_1: Before filling up the Online Registration Application, the aspirants must go through the detailed instruction available on the NGRP Platform. Please proceed to fill the online application only if you are satisfied that you possess the minimum Essential Qualifications stipulated for the post in the detailed advertisement. Otherwise, submitted application shall be outrightly rejected.
CET_APPLY.INSTRUCTIONS_2: The aspirants are advised to fill in all their particulars in the Online Registration Application carefully as submission of wrong information may lead to rejection through computer based short-listing apart from debarment by the Public Examination Authorities [PEA].
CET_APPLY.INSTRUCTIONS_3: The aspirants are advised to fill their correct and active email address & mobile number in the online application as any Correspondence will be made by the Public Examination Authorities [PEA] through e-mail & mobile only. The aspirants are also advised to refer to NGRP Platform for regular updates.
CET_APPLY.INSTRUCTIONS_4: The aspirants are advised to submit only single Online Registration Application.
CET_APPLY.INSTRUCTIONS_5: Registration Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstance nor can the fee be held in reserve for any other examination or selection.
CET_APPLY.INSTRUCTIONS_6: The Candidates Must Upload Only Relevant Documents Wherever Required In The Online Application. The Uploading Of Irrelevant/ Illegible/ Fabricated Or Password-Protected Documents May Lead To rejection of his/her Application Apart From Other Appropriate Action At The Discretion Of The Public Examination Authorities [PEA].

NRA_COMMON_ELIGIBILITY_TEST: What is NGRP Common Eligibility Test (CET)?
UNIOUN_CABINET: The Union Cabinet chaired by Honorable Prime Minister Narendra Modi has decided to set up NGRP as an autonomous and self-reliant body to conduct a Common Eligibility Test (CET) to shortlist candidates for vacancies of Group 'B' non-gazetted posts, Group 'B' gazetted posts, Group 'C' posts in the government and equivalent posts through a computer-based Tier-I examination for three levels viz. graduate, 12<sup>th</sup> pass & 10<sup>th</sup> passs to screen/shortlist candidates for those non-technical jobs for which recruitment is presently carried out through Staff Selection Commission (SSC), the Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs), and the Institute of Banking Personnel Selection (IBPS). NGRP has been setup as society registered under the societies Registration Act 1860 with head quarters at New Delhi.

FOOTER.FOOTER_BOTTOM_TEXT: National Recruitment Portal & Next Generation Recruitment Platform Designed & Developed by National Informatic Centre (NIC) for Next Generation Recruitment Platform (NGRP)
